nasb.text: Now when he had finished measuring the inner house, he brought me out by the way of the gate which faced toward the east and measured it all around.

esv.text: Now when he had finished measuring the interior of the temple area, he led me out by the gate that faced east, and measured the temple area all around.

cnv.text: 他量了內院，就領我出朝東的門，又量了整個殿的周圍。

ccb.text: 他量完圣殿里面，便带我出了东门，量圣殿外围。
